expectations.evidence: width: 33% + margin: 10px creates width calculation problems. 33% + 10px (left) + 10px (right) = 33% + 20px per card. 3 cards = 99% + 60px, which exceeds 100%
display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr)); gap: 20px;
Desktop (>840px): 3 columns, Tablet (560-840px): 2 columns, Mobile (<560px): 1 column, No media queries needed!
Flexbox with flex-wrap: wrap does not make children equal height by default, Grid children in the same row are equal height by default
